candidates.name: AI Coding Assistant Prompt History Diff
candidates.pitch: Snapshots the visible system prompts of major AI coding tools when their web views are open, then diffs across versions and posts changelog notes. Why now: prompt versioning is becoming a developer pa
candidates.pain: Cursor or Copilot silently changed system prompts in the last release and my output quality tanked with no diff to look at.

candidates.name: Cloudflare Worker CPU Time Budget Sentinel
candidates.pitch: Instruments fetch handlers or scrapes wrangler tail output to plot p95 CPU time per route against the budget. Hot because Workers Paid plans tier compute and edge runtimes now dominate cost dashboards
candidates.pain: Engineers overshoot Cloudflare Workers' 10ms CPU budget on paid plans and don't realize until billed.

candidates.pain: Stripe webhook signing secrets get rotated but downstream endpoints don't update, silently dropping events.

candidates.name: Local LLM Token Budget by Tool Call

candidates.name: OAuth Scope Creep Across Connected Apps
candidates.pitch: Inspects OAuth grant screens and account connected-apps pages, scores each app's scope creep risk against least-privilege norms. Browser-only via DOM scraping. Why now: consumer anxiety about data bro
candidates.pain: I don't know which connected apps have read or write access to my Google, Drive, and Slack and whether they over-scoped.
